chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-02 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1 For orders on urgency application 2. For orders on office objection(s) 3. For orders on exemption application 4 For orders on stay application 5. For hearing of main case 01.01.2026 Barrister Unaib Kamal, advocate for petitioner *** 1. Urgency stands disposed of. 2to5. Office has raised objection in terms of the Notification dated 09.09.2025 issued by the Registrar of this Court, according to which cases pertaining to Taluka Shahdadpur, Tando Adam, Sinjhoro and Jam Nawaz Ali of District Sanghar are required to be instituted at Circuit Court Mirpurkhas. We have heard the learned counsel for the petitioner and perused the contents of memo of petition including notification referred to above. From the perusal of the averments it appears that no cause of action, wholly or partly, accrued to the petitioner within territorial jurisdiction of this Court in view of the aforesaid notification. Moreover, the respondents are not stationed/exercising jurisdiction within the territorial limits of this Court. As such this Court lacks jurisdiction to entertain this petition filed under Article 199 of the Constitution. In view of the above position, without dilating upon merits of this case, office is directed to forthwith return this petition alongwith annexures to petitioner for presenting the same before the competent Court having jurisdiction, if so advised, in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
